title: Extra Select Complete Fish Food Blend Tub, 5 Litre
features: Varied Nutrition: Blend caters to pond fish like koi & gold fish food for a balanced, wholesome diet
Rich in Vitamins: Pond fish food with Vitamins A, D, E, C for optimal fish health & vitality
Size Variety: Caters to many fish sizes, goldfish to sturgeon, with a mix of fish pellets & fish sticks.
Easy Digestion: We formulate our fish pond food for easy digestion, reducing risk of bloating.
Wholesome Nutrition: 27% protein aids in fish growth, and spirulina for vibrancy and colour.
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select: Fish Food Blend Ingredients Cereals, derivatives of vegetable origin, meat and animal derivatives, fish and fish derivatives, minerals, oils and fats, algae. Analytical Crude Protein 27%, Crude Fats 4.5%, Crude Fibre 2.5%, Crude Ash 7.5%. Feeding Guide Feed outdoor pond fish 2-3 times daily during summer, once a day in spring and autumn, and pause in winter. Indoor fish benefit from consistent feeding all year. Ensure the food is consumed promptly and clear any uneaten portions to maintain water quality. Handy Tips Measure Meals: Only feed what fish consume in minutes. Seasonal Feeding: More in summer, less in spring/autumn, none in winter. Prevent Overfeeding: Avoid water quality issues by removing uneaten food. Year-Round Indoor Feeding: Safe for indoor ponds throughout the year. Multiple Pellet Types The Extra Select Fish Feed Blend offers a varied mix of nutrients, catering to the dietary needs of all pond fish. Its comprehensive formula supports health and vitality. Balanced Nutrition Packed with essential vitamins A, D, E, and C, alongside a balanced mix of minerals, this feed ensures your pond fish receive all the nutrients they need for growth, health, and vitality. Supports Healthy Fish This blend includes different sized sticks, catering to various fish types and sizes, offering a dietary variety that's not only nutritious but also enjoyable for your fish.
